title: NASA Accused of Lying About UFOs as Congressman Claims Agency Is Hiding Classified Alien Craft Files
description: Congressman Tim Burchett accuses NASA of concealing classified information about UFOs, challenging the agency's public denials.

title: Alien.gov and Aliens.gov Domains Registered by US After Donald Trump’s Promise Over ‘UFO’ Files
description: Reports indicate that the domains were registered through official US government channels, similar to other .gov websites used by federal agencies. However, as of now, neither 'Alien.gov' nor 'Aliens.gov' hosts active content, and authorities have not issued a formal explanation regarding their purpose.

title: Many Witnesses To An Alien Craft Over Arizona
description: 6-27-1947 BISBEE ARIZONA On June 27 John A. Petsche, an electrician working at the Denn Shaft of the Phelps-Dodge Corporation cooper mines near Bisbee, spotted a disc-shaped, mirror-like object which moved “like a flash of light.” Petsche said [...]

title: South Cariboo woman helps document the 2025 Canadian 1,052 UFO sightings
description: Only 3.42 per cent remain unknown, according to Ufology Research
